mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_uuid, email, mobile, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userUuid}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_uuid, email, mobile, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, created_at FROM users WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_uuid, email, mobile, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, created_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_uuid, email, mobile, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, created_at FROM users WHERE mobile = #{mobile} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE mobile = #{mobile}
